summary: Iteration 72 - CMS Follow-ups Testing. All 6 test scenarios passed. (1) CMS live-label propagation works - renamed 'portfolios' to 'Portfolio List Renamed' and Member Levels dialog showed the new label. (2) 'My Calendar' (mentorship-calendar) permission exists in Member Levels dialog. (3) Hidden-section URL block works - when my-community was hidden via CMS, member carlos was redirected away from /my-account/my-community. (4) Portfolio page title shows CMS label without 'My Account' prefix. (5) My Community page title shows CMS label. (6) Regression tests passed - admin login button uses CSS variable (green), sidebar ordering correct.
critical_code_review_comments: MemberLevelsManager.js correctly merges CMS-renamed labels from getMyAccountNav onto SIDEBAR_SECTIONS
MyAccountLayout.js isRouteAllowed now checks navOrderState.visible:false to deny access to hidden sections
PortfolioList.js uses useOutletContext().sectionLabel('portfolios', 'Portfolio List') for h1 title
MyCommunity.js uses useOutletContext().sectionLabel('my-community', 'My Community') for h1 title
SIDEBAR_SECTIONS in MemberLevelsManager.js includes mentorship-calendar with label 'My Calendar'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 tested 4 CMS follow-ups: (1) CMS label rename propagation to Member Levels permissions dialog, (2) mentorship-calendar permission in Member Levels, (3) hidden section URL block for members, (4-5) page titles reflect CMS labels. All tests passed. CMS state was restored after each test (my-community visible=true, labels reset to defaults).
